title: Lampranthus piquetbergensis
taxonomy: Lampranthus piquetbergensis is classified within the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant or viviparous plant family. This family is part of the order Caryophyllales and the class Magnoliopsida. The species Lampranthus piquetbergensis is further classified under the genus Lampranthus, which is a group of succulent plants native to South Africa. The classification of Lampranthus piquetbergensis is also influenced by its characteristics and physical features, such as its succulent leaves and stems. The classification of plants is a continuous process, and new research may lead to adjustments in the classification of Lampranthus piquetbergensis.
